attributes.Sql Query:
/*Non SLS ADJ Transactions*/
SELECT 
   WI.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE,
   WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE,
   WI.BOOK_SOURCE,
   WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,
   WI.ORDER_NUMBER, 
   WI.ORDER_LINE_ID, 
   WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
WI.DERIVED_PARTY_ID,
WI.DERIVED_SAV_ID,
   WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE,
   WI.PARTY_ID,
   WI.SAV_ID,
   WI.SPLIT,
   WI.DNR_FLAG,
WI.ADJUSTMENT_ID,
   WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE,                
   WI.EXPIRY_DATE ,                    
   WI.APPROVED_BY,
   WI.APPROVED_DTM,
   WI.UPLOADED_BY,
   WI.UPLOADED_DTM,
   WI.FILE_NAME,
   WI.REASON_DESCR,
   WI.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT ,
   WI.BK_TOP_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
   WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
   WI.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
   WI.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
   WI.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
   CASE WHEN OREPLACE(WI.VALIDATION_COMMENTS,'') IS NULL THEN 'SUCCESS' ELSE 'FAILED'  END AS STATUS ,
   WI.VALIDATION_COMMENTS,
   WI.FILE_NUM_INT,
   WI.DEAL_ID,
   WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM
FROM 
(
SELECT 
	WI.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE,
    WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE,
    WI.BOOK_SOURCE,
    WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,
    WI.ORDER_NUMBER, 
    WI.ORDER_LINE_ID, 
    WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
WI.DERIVED_PARTY_ID,
WI.DERIVED_SAV_ID,
    WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE,
    WI.PARTY_ID,
    WI.SAV_ID,
    WI.SPLIT,
    WI.DNR_FLAG,
WI.ADJUSTMENT_ID,
    WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE,                
    WI.EXPIRY_DATE ,                    
    WI.APPROVED_BY,
    WI.APPROVED_DTM,
    WI.UPLOADED_BY,
    WI.UPLOADED_DTM,
    WI.FILE_NAME,
    WI.REASON_DESCR,
    WI.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT ,
    WI.BK_TOP_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
    WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
    WI.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
    WI.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
    WI.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
 WI.FILE_NUM_INT,
 WI.DEAL_ID,
 WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM,
    SUM(SPLIT) OVER( PARTITION BY WI.BOOK_SOURCE,WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,WI.ORDER_NUMBER,WI.ORDER_LINE_ID,WI.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT,WI.BK_TOP_POS_TRX_ID_INT,WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
    WI.SK_TRX_ID_INT,WI.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,WI.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE ) SUM_SPLIT,
 MIN(NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT) OVER( PARTITION BY WI.BOOK_SOURCE,WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,WI.ORDER_NUMBER,WI.ORDER_LINE_ID,WI.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT,WI.BK_TOP_POS_TRX_ID_INT,WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
    WI.SK_TRX_ID_INT,WI.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,WI.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE ) MIN_PARTYID,
 MAX(NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT) OVER( PARTITION BY WI.BOOK_SOURCE,WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,WI.ORDER_NUMBER,WI.ORDER_LINE_ID,WI.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT,WI.BK_TOP_POS_TRX_ID_INT,WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
    WI.SK_TRX_ID_INT,WI.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,WI.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE ) MAX_PARTYID,
 MIN(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE) OVER( PARTITION BY WI.BOOK_SOURCE,WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,WI.ORDER_NUMBER,WI.ORDER_LINE_ID,WI.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT,WI.BK_TOP_POS_TRX_ID_INT,WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
    WI.SK_TRX_ID_INT,WI.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,WI.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE ) MIN_EFFECTIVE_DATE,
 MAX(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE) OVER( PARTITION BY WI.BOOK_SOURCE,WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,WI.ORDER_NUMBER,WI.ORDER_LINE_ID,WI.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT,WI.BK_TOP_POS_TRX_ID_INT,WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
    WI.SK_TRX_ID_INT,WI.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,WI.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE ) MAX_EFFECTIVE_DATE,
 CASE WHEN ( WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NOT NULL AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL AND SUSER.CEC_ID is null) -- NOT IN ('pegchen','alytu','amlien','mkasold') )
         THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE' 
		 WHEN ( WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT is null AND RSHCT1.cnt>0 AND RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL AND SUSER.CEC_ID is null) 
         THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE'
         WHEN ( WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NULL AND RSHCT1.cnt=0 AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL AND SUSER.CEC_ID is null) -- NOT IN ('pegchen','alytu','amlien','mkasold') )
         THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE' 
		 WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND ( WI.PARTY_ID IS NOT NULL OR WI.SAV_ID IS NOT NULL OR WI.DNR_FLAG = 'Y' ) 
         THEN 'PARTY_ID,SAV_ID,DNR_FLAG MUST BE NULL IN RULE1' 
         WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE'  AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NOT NULL AND ( RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE <> RSH1.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE OR RSH.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME <> RSH1.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME ) AND SUSER.CEC_ID is null THEN 'CROSS COUNTRY OR THEATER FAILED'
		 WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT is null AND RSHCT1.cnt>0  AND ( RSH1.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE <> RSHCT.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE OR RSH1.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME <> RSHCT.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME ) AND SUSER.CEC_ID is null THEN 'CROSS COUNTRY OR THEATER FAILED'
          WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE'  AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NULL AND RSHCT1.cnt=0  AND ( RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE <> RSH1.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE OR RSH.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME <> RSH1.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME ) AND SUSER.CEC_ID is null THEN 'CROSS COUNTRY OR THEATER FAILED'         
		 ELSE ','
      END AS VALIDATION_1 ,
    CASE WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE2_PARTY' AND NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT IS NULL THEN 'PARTY_ID EITHER INACTIVE OR INVALID' 
         WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE2_PARTY' AND ( WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE IS NOT NULL OR WI.SAV_ID IS NOT NULL OR WI.DNR_FLAG = 'Y' )   
         THEN 'RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE,SAV_ID,DNR_FLAG MUST BE NULL IN RULE2'
   WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE2_PARTY' AND SPLIT <> 100 THEN 'SPLIT must be 100 in RULE2'
         ELSE ','
     END AS VALIDATION_2 ,  
    CASE WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE3_SAV' AND ( NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT IS NULL ) THEN 'PARTY_ID EITHER INACTIVE OR INVALID'
         WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE3_SAV' AND WI.SAV_ID IS NOT NULL AND SAV.BK_SALES_ACCOUNT_ID_INT IS NULL THEN 'SAV_ID EITHER INACTIVE OR INVALID'
   WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE3_SAV' AND WI.SAV_ID IS NOT NULL AND NGSV.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY IS NULL THEN 'PARTY AND SAV_ID COMBINATION INVALID'   
         WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE3_SAV' AND ( WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE IS NOT NULL OR WI.DNR_FLAG = 'Y') 
         THEN 'RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE,DNR_FLAG MUST BE NULL IN RULE3'
        ELSE ','
     END AS VALIDATION_3 ,
    CASE WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE4_DNR' AND RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL AND SUSER.CEC_ID IS NULL THEN 'INVALID SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE'
		 WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE4_DNR' AND DNR_FLAG <> 'Y' THEN 'INVALID DNR FLAG' 
         WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE4_DNR' AND ( WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE IS NOT NULL OR WI.SAV_ID IS NOT NULL OR WI.PARTY_ID IS NOT NULL) 
         THEN 'RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE,PARTY_ID, SAV_ID MUST BE NULL IN RULE4'
         WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE4_DNR' AND SPLIT <> 100 THEN 'SPLIT must be 100 in RULE4'
   ELSE ',' 
     END AS VALIDATION_4 ,   
    CASE WHEN SUM_SPLIT <> 100 THEN 'SPLIT SUM NOT EQUAL 100' ELSE ',' END AS VALIDATION_5 ,
 CASE WHEN EFFECTIVE_DATE IS NULL THEN 'EFFECTIVE DATE MUST BE PROVIDED, CANNOT BE NULL' ELSE ',' END AS VALIDATION_6,
  CASE WHEN (MAX_PARTYID <> MIN_PARTYID)
        THEN 'PARTY ID SHOULD BE UNIQUE IN THIS RULE'
	ELSE ',' END AS VALIDATION_7,
	  CASE WHEN (MAX_EFFECTIVE_DATE <> MIN_EFFECTIVE_DATE)
        THEN 'EFFECTIVE_DATE SHOULD BE UNIQUE IN THIS RULE'
	ELSE ',' END AS VALIDATION_8,
/*CASE WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NOT NULL 
      AND WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM <>'-999' AND NSTA.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_NAME IS NULL 
	   THEN 'AGENT NOT ACTIVE OR AGENT NOT ASSIGNED TO RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE'
	  WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NULL 
      AND WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM <>'-999' AND NSTAC.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_NAME IS NULL 
	   THEN 'AGENT NOT ACTIVE OR AGENT NOT ASSIGNED TO RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE'
	  	  ELSE ',' END AS VALIDATION_9,*/
 TRIM(BOTH ',' FROM REGEXP_REPLACE( VALIDATION_1 ||','|| VALIDATION_2 ||','|| VALIDATION_3 ||','|| VALIDATION_4 ||','|| VALIDATION_5||','||VALIDATION_6||','||VALIDATION_7||','||VALIDATION_8/*||','||VALIDATION_9*/,'(,)+',',',1,0,'c' )) VALIDATION_COMMENTS
FROM ( SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_FIN_ADJ_DRR_NG_2 WHERE BOOK_SOURCE IN ( 'ERP' , 'AR' , 'XAAS' , 'POS' ) 
   AND STATUS = 'SUCCESS'  AND RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE <> 'EXPIRE' )WI
/*INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRR_FIN_ADJ_RULE RL 
    ON WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = RL.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE */
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NP
    ON STATUS_CODE = 'A'
   AND NP.SS_CODE IN ( 'CR' , 'CR_MODS' )
   AND NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = WI.PARTY_ID 
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SAV_PARTY_TV SAV
    ON SAV.BK_SALES_ACCOUNT_ID_INT = WI.SAV_ID
   AND SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_TYPE_CD = 'NAMED_ACCOUNT' 
   AND WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE BETWEEN SAV.START_TV_DT AND SAV.END_TV_DT
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SA_GRPCSTPTY_LNKSYSVW_TV NGSV 
    ON NP.PARTY_KEY = NGSV.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY 
   AND SAV.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY = NGSV.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY
   AND WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE BETWEEN NGSV.START_TV_DT AND NGSV.END_TV_DT
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
    ON RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE 
   AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE' 
   AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN RSH.SALES_TERR_EFFECTIVE_DATE AND COALESCE( RSH.SALES_TERR_EXPIRATION_DATE, DATE '3500-01-01' )   
   
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH1 
    ON RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE 
   AND RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE' 
   AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN RSH1.SALES_TERR_EFFECTIVE_DATE AND COALESCE( RSH1.SALES_TERR_EXPIRATION_DATE, DATE '3500-01-01' )  

/* Added part of May release */
	---start
LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
	on RFMY.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y' AND  ((WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE BETWEEN RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE) or WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE<=RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)

LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_CONFIRMED_TV RSHCT
	ON WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE =  RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
	AND RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE' 
	AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN RSHCT.START_TV_DATE AND RSHCT.END_TV_DATE
      AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN RSHCT.SALES_TERR_EFFECTIVE_DATE AND COALESCE( RSHCT.SALES_TERR_EXPIRATION_DATE, DATE '3500-01-01' )
     ---end
LEFT JOIN ( sel count(1) cnt from $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_CONFIRMED_TV 
	                      WHERE SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE'  ) RSHCT1
	  on 1=1		
  
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.ST_USER_ROLE SUSER
ON WI.APPROVED_BY=SUSER.CEC_ID AND SUSER.ACTIVE_FLAG='Y'
/* Agent ID Validation 
LEFT JOIN ( select * from $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_ASSGN_CNF 
	qualify row_number() OVER(partition by BK_SALES_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_NAME,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY order by coalesce(ASSIGNMENT_END_DT ,cast('3500-01-01' as date)) desc) =1
	) NSTAC
        ON NSTAC.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
		AND NSTAC.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_NAME = WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM
		AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN NSTAC.ASSIGNMENT_START_DT AND NSTAC.ASSIGNMENT_END_DT
LEFT JOIN (select * from $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_ASSGN 
     qualify row_number() OVER(partition by BK_SALES_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_NAME,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY order by coalesce(ASSIGNMENT_END_DT ,cast('3500-01-01' as date)) desc) =1
   ) NSTA
        ON NSTA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
		AND NSTA.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_NAME = WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM
		AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN NSTA.ASSIGNMENT_START_DT AND NSTA.ASSIGNMENT_END_DT	*/
		
) WI

UNION ALL

/*Non SLS ADJ Transactions*/
SELECT 
   WI.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE,
   WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE,
   WI.BOOK_SOURCE,
   WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,
   WI.ORDER_NUMBER, 
   WI.ORDER_LINE_ID, 
   WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
WI.DERIVED_PARTY_ID,
WI.DERIVED_SAV_ID,
   WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE,
   WI.PARTY_ID,
   WI.SAV_ID,
   WI.SPLIT,
   WI.DNR_FLAG,
WI.ADJUSTMENT_ID,
   WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE,                
   WI.EXPIRY_DATE ,                    
   WI.APPROVED_BY,
   WI.APPROVED_DTM,
   WI.UPLOADED_BY,
   WI.UPLOADED_DTM,
   WI.FILE_NAME,
   WI.REASON_DESCR,
   WI.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT ,
   WI.BK_TOP_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
   WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
   WI.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
   WI.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
   WI.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
   WI.STATUS ,
   WI.VALIDATION_COMMENTS,
   WI.FILE_NUM_INT,
   WI.DEAL_ID,
   WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM
FROM 
(
SELECT 
	WI.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE,
    WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE,
    WI.BOOK_SOURCE,
    WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,
    WI.ORDER_NUMBER, 
    WI.ORDER_LINE_ID, 
    WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
WI.DERIVED_PARTY_ID,
WI.DERIVED_SAV_ID,
    WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE,
    WI.PARTY_ID,
    WI.SAV_ID,
    WI.SPLIT,
    WI.DNR_FLAG,
WI.ADJUSTMENT_ID,
    WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE,                
    WI.EXPIRY_DATE ,                    
    WI.APPROVED_BY,
    WI.APPROVED_DTM,
    WI.UPLOADED_BY,
    WI.UPLOADED_DTM,
    WI.FILE_NAME,
    WI.REASON_DESCR,
    WI.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT ,
    WI.BK_TOP_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
    WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
    WI.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
    WI.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
    WI.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
 WI.FILE_NUM_INT,
 WI.DEAL_ID,
 WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM,
 WI.STATUS ,
 WI.VALIDATION_COMMENTS
  FROM ( SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_FIN_ADJ_DRR_NG_2 WHERE STATUS = 'SUCCESS'  AND RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE = 'EXPIRE' )WI
		
) WI

/*Loading SLS_ADJ Transactions & failed records from NG_2 WI to NG_3 WI*/
SELECT 
   WI.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE,
   WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE,
   WI.BOOK_SOURCE,
   WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,
   WI.ORDER_NUMBER, 
   WI.ORDER_LINE_ID, 
   WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
WI.DERIVED_PARTY_ID,
WI.DERIVED_SAV_ID,
   WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE,
   WI.PARTY_ID,
   WI.SAV_ID,
   WI.SPLIT,
   WI.DNR_FLAG,
WI.ADJUSTMENT_ID,
   WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE,                
   WI.EXPIRY_DATE ,                    
   WI.APPROVED_BY,
   WI.APPROVED_DTM,
   WI.UPLOADED_BY,
   WI.UPLOADED_DTM,
   WI.FILE_NAME,
   WI.REASON_DESCR,
   WI.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT ,
   WI.BK_TOP_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
   WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
   WI.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
   WI.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
   WI.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
   CASE WHEN OREPLACE(WI.VALIDATION_COMMENTS,'') IS NULL THEN 'SUCCESS' ELSE 'FAILED'  END AS STATUS ,
   WI.VALIDATION_COMMENTS,
   WI.FILE_NUM_INT,
   WI.DEAL_ID,
   WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM
FROM 
(
SELECT 
   WI.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE,
   WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE,
   WI.BOOK_SOURCE,
   WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,
   WI.ORDER_NUMBER, 
   WI.ORDER_LINE_ID, 
   WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
WI.DERIVED_PARTY_ID,
WI.DERIVED_SAV_ID,
   WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE,
   WI.PARTY_ID,
   WI.SAV_ID,
   WI.SPLIT,
   WI.DNR_FLAG,
WI.ADJUSTMENT_ID,
   WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE,                
   WI.EXPIRY_DATE ,                    
   WI.APPROVED_BY,
   WI.APPROVED_DTM,
   WI.UPLOADED_BY,
   WI.UPLOADED_DTM,
   WI.FILE_NAME,
   WI.REASON_DESCR,
   WI.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT ,
   WI.BK_TOP_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
   WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
   WI.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
   WI.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
   WI.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
   WI.FILE_NUM_INT,
   WI.DEAL_ID,
   WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM,
   SUM(SPLIT) OVER( PARTITION BY WI.BOOK_SOURCE,WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,WI.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,WI.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE ) SUM_SPLIT,
   MIN(COALESCE(NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT,-999))  OVER( PARTITION BY WI.BOOK_SOURCE,WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,WI.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,WI.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE ) MIN_PARTYID,
   MAX(COALESCE(NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT,-999)) OVER( PARTITION BY WI.BOOK_SOURCE,WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,WI.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,WI.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE ) MAX_PARTYID,
   MIN(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE) OVER( PARTITION BY WI.BOOK_SOURCE,WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,WI.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,WI.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE ) MIN_EFFECTIVE_DATE,
   MAX(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE) OVER( PARTITION BY WI.BOOK_SOURCE,WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,WI.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,WI.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE ) MAX_EFFECTIVE_DATE,
   CASE 
      /*WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RL.TRANS_SUB_TYPE = 'REBATE' AND NSA.BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE NOT LIKE '%RB%' 
            THEN 'NOT A REBATE ADJUSTMENT' 
         WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RL.TRANS_SUB_TYPE = 'CLOUD' AND ( NSA.BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE NOT LIKE '%CLD%' AND NSA.BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE NOT LIKE '%CLOUD%' ) 
            THEN 'NOT A CLOUD ADJUSTMENT' */
     WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NOT NULL AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL AND SUSER.CEC_ID is null -- NOT IN ('pegchen','alytu','amlien','mkasold')
            THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE' 
	 WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NULL AND RSHCT1.cnt>0  AND RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL AND SUSER.CEC_ID is null -- NOT IN ('pegchen','alytu','amlien','mkasold')
            THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE' 
	 WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NULL AND RSHCT1.cnt=0  AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL AND SUSER.CEC_ID is null -- NOT IN ('pegchen','alytu','amlien','mkasold')
            THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE' 		
   WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND ( WI.PARTY_ID IS NOT NULL OR WI.SAV_ID IS NOT NULL OR WI.DNR_FLAG = 'Y' ) 
   THEN 'PARTY_ID,SAV_ID,DNR_FLAG MUST BE NULL IN RULE1'
   WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NOT NULL AND ( RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE <> RSH1.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE OR RSH.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME <> RSH1.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME ) AND SUSER.CEC_ID is null THEN 'CROSS COUNTRY OR THEATER FAILED'
   WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT is null  AND RSHCT1.cnt>0 AND ( RSH1.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE <> RSHCT.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE OR RSH1.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME <> RSHCT.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME ) AND SUSER.CEC_ID is null THEN 'CROSS COUNTRY OR THEATER FAILED'
   WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NULL AND RSHCT1.cnt=0 AND ( RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE <> RSH1.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE OR RSH.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME <> RSH1.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME ) AND SUSER.CEC_ID is null THEN 'CROSS COUNTRY OR THEATER FAILED'
     ELSE ','
   END VALIDATION_1, 
   CASE 
  /*WHEN RL.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE2_PARTY' AND RL.TRANS_SUB_TYPE = 'WEBEX' AND NSA.BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE NOT LIKE '%WEBEX%'
            THEN 'NOT A WEBEX ADJUSTMENT' 
  WHEN RL.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE2_PARTY' AND RL.TRANS_SUB_TYPE = 'ACQUISITION' AND 
            ( NSA.BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE LIKE '%AC%CLD%' OR NSA.BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE LIKE '%AC%CLOUD%' OR NSA.BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE LIKE '%AC%WEBEX%' )  
   THEN 'NOT AN ACQUISTION ADJUSTMENT'
  WHEN RL.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE2_PARTY' AND RL.TRANS_SUB_TYPE = 'ACQUISITION' AND NSA.BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE NOT LIKE 'AC%'   
            THEN 'NOT AN ACQUISTION ADJUSTMENT' */
  WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE2_PARTY' AND NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT IS NULL
   THEN 'INVALID PARTY ID'  
  WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE2_PARTY' AND SPLIT <> 100 
   THEN 'SPLIT must be 100 in RULE2'
  ELSE ','
    END AS VALIDATION_2 ,
    CASE 
	 WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE3_SAV' AND NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT IS NULL 
     THEN 'PARTY_ID EITHER INACTIVE OR INVALID'
        WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE3_SAV' AND WI.SAV_ID IS NOT NULL AND SAV.BK_SALES_ACCOUNT_ID_INT IS NULL 
   THEN 'SAV_ID EITHER INACTIVE OR INVALID'
  WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE3_SAV' AND WI.SAV_ID IS NOT NULL  AND NGSV.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY IS NULL 
   THEN 'PARTY AND SAV COMBINATION INVALID'
        ELSE ','
    END AS VALIDATION_3 ,
    CASE WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE4_DNR' AND RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL AND SUSER.CEC_ID IS NULL 
			THEN  'INVALID SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE' 
		WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE4_DNR' AND DNR_FLAG <> 'Y' 
			THEN 'INVALID DNR FLAG' 
		WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE4_DNR' AND SPLIT <> 100 
			THEN 'SPLIT must be 100 in RULE4'
        ELSE ',' 
		END AS VALIDATION_4 ,  
    CASE 
     WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND ( WI.PARTY_ID IS NOT NULL OR WI.SAV_ID IS NOT NULL OR WI.DNR_FLAG = 'Y' ) 
            THEN 'PARTY_ID,SAV_ID,DNR_FLAG MUST BE NULL IN RULE1' 
         WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE2_PARTY' AND ( WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE IS NOT NULL OR WI.SAV_ID IS NOT NULL OR WI.DNR_FLAG = 'Y' ) 
            THEN 'RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE,SAV_ID,DNR_FLAG MUST BE NULL IN RULE2' 
     WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE3_SAV' AND ( WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE IS NOT NULL OR WI.DNR_FLAG = 'Y' ) 
            THEN 'RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE,DNR_FLAG MUST BE NULL IN RULE3'
     WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE4_DNR' AND ( WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE IS NOT NULL OR WI.SAV_ID IS NOT NULL OR WI.PARTY_ID IS NOT NULL) 
            THEN 'RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE,PARTY_ID, SAV_ID MUST BE NULL IN RULE4'
     ELSE ','
    END AS VALIDATION_5 ,
    /*CASE 
   WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE IN ( 'RULE3_SAV' , 'RULE4_DNR' ) AND 
               ( NSA.BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE LIKE '%WEBEX%' OR NSA.BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE LIKE 'AC%' OR NSA.BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE LIKE '%CLD%' OR 
               NSA.BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE LIKE '%CLOUD%' OR NSA.BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE = 'RB' ) 
         THEN 'NOT A VALID ADJUSTMENT UNDER RULE3,RULE4' 
          ELSE ',' 
     END AS VALIDATION_6, */
 /* CASE 
    WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE IN ( 'RULE2_PARTY','RULE3_SAV','RULE4_DNR' ) AND WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE LIKE '%CLD%OFFSET%' OR WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE LIKE '%CLOUD%OFFSET%' 
           THEN 'CLOUD OFFSET ADJ ARE NOT VALID IN RULE2,RULE3,RULE4'
           ELSE ',' 
    END AS VALIDATION_7, */
    CASE 
    WHEN SUM_SPLIT <> 100 
      THEN 'SPLIT SUM NOT EQUAL 100' 
    ELSE ',' 
 END AS VALIDATION_8 ,
 CASE   
    WHEN EFFECTIVE_DATE IS NULL 
      THEN 'EFFECTIVE DATE MUST BE PROVIDED, CANNOT BE NULL' ELSE ','
 END AS VALIDATION_9,
CASE WHEN (MAX_PARTYID <> MIN_PARTYID)
        THEN 'PARTY ID SHOULD BE UNIQUE IN THIS RULE'
	ELSE ',' END AS VALIDATION_10,
CASE WHEN (MAX_EFFECTIVE_DATE <> MIN_EFFECTIVE_DATE)
        THEN 'EFFECTIVE_DATE SHOULD BE UNIQUE IN THIS RULE'
	ELSE ',' END AS VALIDATION_11,
/*CASE WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NOT NULL 
      AND WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM <>'-999' AND NSTA.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_NAME IS NULL 
	   THEN 'AGENT NOT ACTIVE OR AGENT NOT ASSIGNED TO RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE'
	  WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1_NODE' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NULL 
      AND WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM <>'-999' AND NSTAC.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_NAME IS NULL 
	   THEN 'AGENT NOT ACTIVE OR AGENT NOT ASSIGNED TO RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE'
	  	  ELSE ',' END AS VALIDATION_12,*/
    TRIM(BOTH ',' FROM REGEXP_REPLACE( VALIDATION_1 ||','|| VALIDATION_2 ||','|| VALIDATION_3 ||','|| VALIDATION_4 ||','|| VALIDATION_5||','||VALIDATION_8||','||VALIDATION_9||','||VALIDATION_10||','||VALIDATION_11/*||','||VALIDATION_12*/,'(,)+',',',1,0,'c' )) VALIDATION_COMMENTS
FROM (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_FIN_ADJ_DRR_NG_2 WHERE BOOK_SOURCE IN ( 'SLS_ADJ' ) 
          AND STATUS = 'SUCCESS'  AND RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE <> 'EXPIRE' ) WI
/*INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRR_FIN_ADJ_RULE RL 
   ON WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = RL.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE */
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NP
   ON STATUS_CODE = 'A'
  AND NP.SS_CODE IN ( 'CR' , 'CR_MODS' )
  AND NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = WI.PARTY_ID 
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SAV_PARTY_TV SAV
   ON SAV.BK_SALES_ACCOUNT_ID_INT = WI.SAV_ID
   AND SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_TYPE_CD = 'NAMED_ACCOUNT' 
   AND WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE BETWEEN SAV.START_TV_DT AND SAV.END_TV_DT
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SA_GRPCSTPTY_LNKSYSVW_TV NGSV 
   ON NP.PARTY_KEY = NGSV.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY 
   AND SAV.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY = NGSV.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY
   AND WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE BETWEEN NGSV.START_TV_DT AND NGSV.END_TV_DT
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
   ON RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE
   AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE' 
   AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN RSH.SALES_TERR_EFFECTIVE_DATE AND COALESCE( RSH.SALES_TERR_EXPIRATION_DATE, DATE '3500-01-01' )  

LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH1 
    ON RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE 
   AND RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE' 
   AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN RSH1.SALES_TERR_EFFECTIVE_DATE AND COALESCE( RSH1.SALES_TERR_EXPIRATION_DATE, DATE '3500-01-01' ) 
   
/* Added part of May release */
	---start
	LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
	on RFMY.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y' AND  ((WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE BETWEEN RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE) or WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE<=RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)

	LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_CONFIRMED_TV RSHCT
	ON WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE =  RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
	AND RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE' 
	AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN RSHCT.START_TV_DATE AND RSHCT.END_TV_DATE
    AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN RSHCT.SALES_TERR_EFFECTIVE_DATE AND COALESCE( RSHCT.SALES_TERR_EXPIRATION_DATE, DATE '3500-01-01' ) 
    ---end
	LEFT JOIN ( sel count(1) cnt from $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_CONFIRMED_TV 
	                      WHERE SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE'  ) RSHCT1
	  on 1=1		
   
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE NSAL
   ON WI.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT = NSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT
/* LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT NSA
   ON NSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT = NSA.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT */
   LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.ST_USER_ROLE SUSER
             ON WI.APPROVED_BY=SUSER.CEC_ID AND SUSER.ACTIVE_FLAG='Y'
/* Agent ID Validation  
LEFT JOIN (select * from $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_ASSGN_CNF 
    qualify row_number() OVER(partition by BK_SALES_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_NAME,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY order by coalesce(ASSIGNMENT_END_DT ,cast('3500-01-01' as date)) desc) =1
     ) NSTAC
        ON NSTAC.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
		AND NSTAC.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_NAME = WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM
		AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN NSTAC.ASSIGNMENT_START_DT AND NSTAC.ASSIGNMENT_END_DT
  LEFT JOIN (select * from $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_ASSGN 
    qualify row_number() OVER(partition by BK_SALES_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_NAME,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY order by coalesce(ASSIGNMENT_END_DT ,cast('3500-01-01' as date)) desc) =1
     ) NSTA
        ON NSTA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
		AND NSTA.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_NAME = WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM
		AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN NSTA.ASSIGNMENT_START_DT AND NSTA.ASSIGNMENT_END_DT		*/		 
) WI

UNION ALL

SELECT 
   WI.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE,
   WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE,
   WI.BOOK_SOURCE,
   WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,
   WI.ORDER_NUMBER, 
   WI.ORDER_LINE_ID, 
   WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
WI.DERIVED_PARTY_ID,
WI.DERIVED_SAV_ID,
   WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE,
   WI.PARTY_ID,
   WI.SAV_ID,
   WI.SPLIT,
   WI.DNR_FLAG,
WI.ADJUSTMENT_ID,
   WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE,                
   WI.EXPIRY_DATE ,                    
   WI.APPROVED_BY,
   WI.APPROVED_DTM,
   WI.UPLOADED_BY,
   WI.UPLOADED_DTM,
   WI.FILE_NAME,
   WI.REASON_DESCR,
   WI.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT ,
   WI.BK_TOP_POS_TRX_ID_INT ,
   WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
   WI.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT ,
   WI.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
   WI.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
   WI.STATUS,
   WI.VALIDATION_COMMENTS,
   WI.FILE_NUM_INT,
   WI.DEAL_ID,
   WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM
FROM $$STGDB.WI_FIN_ADJ_DRR_NG_2 WI WHERE STATUS = 'FAILED'

SELECT 
   WI.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE,
   WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE,
   WI.BOOK_SOURCE,
   WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,
   WI.ORDER_NUMBER, 
   WI.ORDER_LINE_ID, 
   WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
   WI.DERIVED_PARTY_ID,
  WI.DERIVED_SAV_ID,
   WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE,
   WI.PARTY_ID,
   WI.SAV_ID,
   WI.SPLIT,
   WI.DNR_FLAG,
  WI.ADJUSTMENT_ID,
   WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE,                
   WI.EXPIRY_DATE ,                    
   WI.APPROVED_BY,
   WI.APPROVED_DTM,
   WI.UPLOADED_BY,
   WI.UPLOADED_DTM,
   WI.FILE_NAME,
   WI.REASON_DESCR,
   WI.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT ,
   WI.BK_TOP_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
   WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
   WI.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
   WI.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
   WI.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
   CASE WHEN OREPLACE(WI.VALIDATION_COMMENTS,'') IS NULL THEN 'SUCCESS' ELSE 'FAILED'  END AS STATUS ,
   WI.VALIDATION_COMMENTS,
   WI.FILE_NUM_INT,
   WI.DEAL_ID,
   WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM
FROM 
(
SELECT 
    WI.RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE,
    WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE,
    WI.BOOK_SOURCE,
    WI.BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE,
    WI.ORDER_NUMBER, 
    WI.ORDER_LINE_ID, 
    WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
   WI.DERIVED_PARTY_ID,
  WI.DERIVED_SAV_ID,
    WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE,
    WI.PARTY_ID,
    WI.SAV_ID,
    WI.SPLIT,
    WI.DNR_FLAG,
 WI.ADJUSTMENT_ID,
    WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE,                
    WI.EXPIRY_DATE ,                    
    WI.APPROVED_BY,
    WI.APPROVED_DTM,
    WI.UPLOADED_BY,
    WI.UPLOADED_DTM,
    WI.FILE_NAME,
    WI.REASON_DESCR,
    WI.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT ,
    WI.BK_TOP_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
    WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
    WI.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
    WI.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
    WI.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
 WI.FILE_NUM_INT,
 WI.DEAL_ID,
 WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM,
    SUM(SPLIT) OVER( PARTITION BY WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE, WI.DERIVED_PARTY_ID, /*WI.DERIVED_SAV_ID,*/WI.DEAL_ID ) SUM_SPLIT,
 
 MIN(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE) OVER( PARTITION BY WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE, WI.DERIVED_PARTY_ID,/* WI.DERIVED_SAV_ID,*/WI.DEAL_ID) MIN_EFFECTIVE_DATE,
 MAX(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE) OVER( PARTITION BY WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE, WI.DERIVED_PARTY_ID, /*WI.DERIVED_SAV_ID,*/WI.DEAL_ID) MAX_EFFECTIVE_DATE,
 
 CASE WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1A_NODE_PARTY' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NOT NULL AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL AND SUSER.CEC_ID IS NULL THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE' 
	      WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1A_NODE_PARTY' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NULL AND RSHCT1.cnt>0 AND RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL  AND SUSER.CEC_ID IS NULL THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE'
          WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1A_NODE_PARTY' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NULL AND RSHCT1.cnt=0 AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL AND SUSER.CEC_ID IS NULL THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE'
          WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1A_NODE_PARTY' AND ( WI.DERIVED_PARTY_ID IS NULL OR WI.DERIVED_SAV_ID IS NOT NULL OR WI.DNR_FLAG = 'Y' )  THEN 'DERIVED_SAV_ID,DNR_FLAG MUST BE NULL IN RULE1A_NODE_PARTY' 
	      WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1A_NODE_PARTY' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NOT NULL AND ( RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE <> RSH1.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE OR RSH.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME <> RSH1.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME ) AND SUSER.CEC_ID is null THEN 'CROSS COUNTRY OR THEATER FAILED'
		  WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1A_NODE_PARTY' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NULL AND RSHCT1.cnt>0 AND ( RSHCT.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE <> RSH1.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE OR RSH1.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME <> RSHCT.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME ) AND SUSER.CEC_ID is null THEN 'CROSS COUNTRY OR THEATER FAILED'
          WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1A_NODE_PARTY' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NULL AND RSHCT1.cnt=0 AND ( RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE <> RSH1.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE OR RSH.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME <> RSH1.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME ) AND SUSER.CEC_ID is null THEN 'CROSS COUNTRY OR THEATER FAILED'
		  ELSE ','
          END AS VALIDATION_1 ,
	  /*commented as part of US286564 changes*/
    /*CASE WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1B_NODE_SAV' AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE  IS NULL AND SUSER.CEC_ID IS NULL THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE'  
         WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1B_NODE_SAV' AND ( WI.DERIVED_PARTY_ID IS NOT NULL OR WI.DERIVED_SAV_ID IS NULL OR WI.DNR_FLAG = 'Y' )   
         THEN 'DERIVED_PARTY_ID,DNR_FLAG MUST BE NULL IN RULE2 AND DERIVED_SAV_ID MUST NOT NULL'
          WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1B_NODE_SAV' AND ( RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE <> RSH1.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE OR RSH.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME <> RSH1.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME ) AND SUSER.CEC_ID is null THEN 'CROSS COUNTRY OR THEATER FAILED'
         ELSE ','
     END AS VALIDATION_2 ,*/  
    CASE WHEN RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE4A_NODE_PARTY' AND RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL AND SUSER.CEC_ID IS NULL THEN 'INVALID SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE'
		 WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE4A_NODE_PARTY' AND DNR_FLAG <> 'Y' THEN 'INVALID DNR FLAG' 
         WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE4A_NODE_PARTY' AND ( WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE IS NOT NULL OR WI.DERIVED_SAV_ID IS NOT NULL OR WI.DERIVED_PARTY_ID  IS NULL) 
         THEN 'RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE, SAV_ID MUST BE NULL IN RULE4A_NODE_PARTY AND PARTY_ID MUST NOT BE NULL'
         ELSE ',' 
     END AS VALIDATION_4 ,
/*commented as part of US286564 changes*/	 
	 /*CASE WHEN RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE4B_NODE_SAV' AND RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL AND SUSER.CEC_ID IS NULL THEN 'INVALID SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE'
		 WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE4B_NODE_SAV' AND DNR_FLAG <> 'Y' THEN 'INVALID DNR FLAG' 
         WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE4B_NODE_SAV' AND ( WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE IS NOT NULL OR WI.DERIVED_SAV_ID IS NULL OR WI.DERIVED_PARTY_ID  IS NOT NULL) 
         THEN 'RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE, PARTY_ID MUST BE NULL IN RULE4B_NODE_SAV AND SAV_ID MUST NOT BE NULL'
         ELSE ',' 
     END AS VALIDATION_3 ,*/
	  CASE  WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1C_NODE_DEAL' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT is not null AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL AND SUSER.CEC_ID IS NULL
         THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE' 
		 WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1C_NODE_DEAL' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT is null AND RSHCT1.cnt>0 AND RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL AND SUSER.CEC_ID IS NULL
         THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE' 
		  WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1C_NODE_DEAL' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT is null AND RSHCT1.cnt=0 AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL AND SUSER.CEC_ID IS NULL
         THEN 'INVALID RESTATED_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE' 
         WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1C_NODE_DEAL' AND WI.DNR_FLAG = 'Y'
         THEN 'DNR_FLAG MUST BE NULL IN RULE1C_NODE_DEAL' 
		 WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1C_NODE_DEAL' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT is not null AND ( RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE <> RSH1.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE OR RSH.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME <> RSH1.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME ) AND SUSER.CEC_ID is null THEN 'CROSS COUNTRY OR THEATER FAILED'
		 WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1C_NODE_DEAL' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT is null AND RSHCT1.cnt>0 AND ( RSHCT.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE <> RSH1.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE OR RSHCT.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME <> RSH1.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME ) AND SUSER.CEC_ID is null THEN 'CROSS COUNTRY OR THEATER FAILED'
		 WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE1C_NODE_DEAL' AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT is null AND RSHCT1.cnt=0 AND ( RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE <> RSH1.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE OR RSH.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME <> RSH1.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME ) AND SUSER.CEC_ID is null THEN 'CROSS COUNTRY OR THEATER FAILED'
         ELSE ','
      END AS VALIDATION_9 ,
	  	  CASE  WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE4C_NODE_DEAL' AND RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IS NULL AND SUSER.CEC_ID IS NULL
         THEN 'INVALID SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE' 
         WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE4C_NODE_DEAL' AND WI.DNR_FLAG<>'Y'
         THEN 'DNR_FLAG MUST BE Y IN RULE4C_NODE_DEAL' 
		 WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = 'RULE4C_NODE_DEAL' AND ( RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE <> RSH1.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE OR RSH.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME <> RSH1.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME ) AND SUSER.CEC_ID is null THEN 'CROSS COUNTRY OR THEATER FAILED'
         ELSE ','
      END AS VALIDATION_10 ,
    CASE WHEN SUM_SPLIT <> 100 THEN 'SPLIT SUM NOT EQUAL 100' ELSE ',' END AS VALIDATION_5 ,   
 CASE WHEN EFFECTIVE_DATE IS NULL THEN 'EFFECTIVE DATE MUST BE PROVIDED, CANNOT BE NULL' ELSE ',' END AS VALIDATION_6,
     CASE WHEN (MAX_EFFECTIVE_DATE <> MIN_EFFECTIVE_DATE)
        THEN 'EFFECTIVE_DATE SHOULD BE UNIQUE IN THIS RULE'
	ELSE ',' END AS VALIDATION_8,
 /*CASE WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE IN('RULE1A_NODE_PARTY','RULE1C_NODE_DEAL') AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NOT NULL 
      AND WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM <>'-999' AND NSTA.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_NAME IS NULL 
	   THEN 'AGENT NOT ACTIVE OR AGENT NOT ASSIGNED TO RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE'
	  WHEN WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE IN('RULE1A_NODE_PARTY','RULE1C_NODE_DEAL') AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IS NULL 
      AND WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM <>'-999' AND NSTAC.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_NAME IS NULL 
	   THEN 'AGENT NOT ACTIVE OR AGENT NOT ASSIGNED TO RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE'
	  ELSE ',' END AS VALIDATION_11,*/
   
 TRIM(BOTH ',' FROM REGEXP_REPLACE( VALIDATION_1 ||','|| /*VALIDATION_2 ||','|| VALIDATION_3 ||','||*/VALIDATION_4 ||','|| VALIDATION_5||','||VALIDATION_6||','||VALIDATION_8||','||VALIDATION_9||','||VALIDATION_10/*||','||VALIDATION_11*/,'(,)+',',',1,0,'c' )) VALIDATION_COMMENTS
FROM ( SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_FIN_ADJ_DRR_NG_2 WHERE RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE IN ('RULE1A_NODE_PARTY',/*'RULE1B_NODE_SAV',*/'RULE4A_NODE_PARTY', /*'RULE4B_NODE_SAV',*/'RULE1C_NODE_DEAL','RULE4C_NODE_DEAL') AND STATUS = 'SUCCESS' )WI
/*INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRR_FIN_ADJ_RULE RL 
    ON WI.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE = RL.RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE  */
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
    ON RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE 
   AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE' 
   AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN RSH.SALES_TERR_EFFECTIVE_DATE AND COALESCE( RSH.SALES_TERR_EXPIRATION_DATE, DATE '3500-01-01' )  

LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH1 
    ON RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE 
   AND RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE' 
   AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN RSH1.SALES_TERR_EFFECTIVE_DATE AND COALESCE( RSH1.SALES_TERR_EXPIRATION_DATE, DATE '3500-01-01' )
   
      /* Added part of May release */
	---start
	LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
	on RFMY.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y' AND  ((WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE BETWEEN RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE) or WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE<=RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)

	LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_CONFIRMED_TV RSHCT
	ON WI.RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE =  RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
	AND RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE' 
	AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN RSHCT.START_TV_DATE AND RSHCT.END_TV_DATE
     AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN RSHCT.SALES_TERR_EFFECTIVE_DATE AND COALESCE( RSHCT.SALES_TERR_EXPIRATION_DATE, DATE '3500-01-01' )
     ---end
	 LEFT JOIN ( sel count(1) cnt from $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_CONFIRMED_TV 
	                      WHERE SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE'  ) RSHCT1
	  on 1=1	

LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.ST_USER_ROLE SUSER
             ON WI.APPROVED_BY=SUSER.CEC_ID AND SUSER.ACTIVE_FLAG='Y'
/* Agent ID Validation 	 
LEFT JOIN (select * from $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_ASSGN_CNF 
         qualify row_number() OVER(partition by BK_SALES_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_NAME,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY order by coalesce(ASSIGNMENT_END_DT ,cast('3500-01-01' as date)) desc) =1
		 ) NSTAC
        ON NSTAC.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = RSHCT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
		AND NSTAC.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_NAME = WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM
		AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN NSTAC.ASSIGNMENT_START_DT AND NSTAC.ASSIGNMENT_END_DT
  LEFT JOIN ( select * from $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_ASSGN 
     qualify row_number() OVER(partition by BK_SALES_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_NAME,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY order by coalesce(ASSIGNMENT_END_DT ,cast('3500-01-01' as date)) desc) =1
       ) NSTA
        ON NSTA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
		AND NSTA.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_NAME = WI.NEW_AGENT_NUM
		AND CAST(WI.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN NSTA.ASSIGNMENT_START_DT AND NSTA.ASSIGNMENT_END_DT		*/		 
   
) WI
